title: Anaconda (2025) - Reviews and Audience Reception
text: The Anaconda 2025 film holds a 47% Tomatometer score based on 158 reviews. Critics consensus suggests the movie struggles with tonal inconsistency, with one assessment noting it can't detach its jaws wide enough to swallow so many conflicting tones. Key critical points include mixed quality with one reviewer calling it a regurgitated mess despite the strong cast, plotting issues with critics noting the film is so loosey goosey in its plotting that investment becomes difficult, and tone problems where the balance between comedy and scares allegedly renders everything dull and diluted. The 74% Popcornmeter score based on 2,500+ verified ratings shows notably stronger audience approval than critical reception. Audiences credit the buoyant charisma of the lead actors, calling the film as delightfully ridiculous as it is tongue-in-snake. Some found it hilarious and couldn't stop laughing, while others felt disappointed, noting the funny parts were in the trailer with uneven pacing across the runtime. Box office USA gross: $64.9M.
